question: Will Sam Bankman-Fried successfully appeal any of his convictions or sentence?
textDescription: Resolves YES if any of his 7 convictions are overturned or he asks for and gets a resentencing. Resolves NO when his direct appeal is over or his time to appeal has lapsed, e.g. cert denied at SCOTUS.
newsShortReason: Recent legal setbacks and judicial skepticism suggest low likelihood of successful appeal.
newsKeyEvidence: April 28, 2026: Judge denies Bankman-Fried's new trial request, calling claims baseless. | November 4, 2025: Appeals court judges express skepticism over Bankman-Fried's appeal arguments. | February 2026: Bankman-Fried files for new trial, but appeal remains active. | March 2026: Court audio reveals discussions on potential mediation in Bankman-Fried's case.
